name: Crazy
description: Crazy paving of irregular four-sided stones, re-cutting their edges on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-clip-path: polygon(@rand(0%, 20%) @rand(0%, 20%), @rand(80%, 100%) @rand(0%, 30%), @rand(80%, 100%) @rand(80%, 100%), @rand(0%, 30%) @rand(80%, 100%)); clip-path: polygon(@rand(0%, 20%) @rand(0%, 20%), @rand(80%, 100%) @rand(0%, 30%), @rand(80%, 100%) @rand(80%, 100%), @rand(0%, 30%) @rand(80%, 100%)); } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
